case_title: CALIFORNIA CASUALTY INDEMNITY EXCHANGE VS. GEORGIANNA WELLS MINARD et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL ON OSC FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CASUALTY INDEMNITY EXCHANGE
ARBITRATOR CAROL LEE HEALEY APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION AUG-23-2004 THROUGH NOV-21-2004.
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF DEC-21-2004, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CASUALTY INDEMNITY EXCHANGE AS TO DEFENDANT MINARD, GEORGIANNA WELLS DOES 1-5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-14-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-15-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-29-2004

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-14-2004 CONTINUED TO JUN-18-2004 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT (S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-28-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JUN-18-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)
